title: verbena halei f. roseiflora
intro: Verbena halei f. roseiflora, also known as Verbena, is a perennial herb belonging to the Verbenaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, due to its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Verbena include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote calmness and well-being.
